statement.en: Optimisation of Low-Rise Lightweight Steel-Framed Residential Building Design in China’s Hot-Summer-Cold-Winter Zone by Life-Cycle Carbon Analysis

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or provisional) presenting applied optimization research combining engineering design, LCA methodology, and regional building standards. The work is neither established fact nor refuted; it represents active research under validation. The carbon optimization claims are empirically testable but context-dependent on boundary conditions, material databases, and climate zone parameters.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 温度ゆらぎの中で、軽い骨組みが炭素の呼吸を繰り返す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 季節の揺らぎと骨組みの軽さが、交差する時間の中で炭素を最小化する。
